subject: Re:
body:
Thank U so much. I think I understand dear Jeffrey.
 I'm sorry If I have faild U.
Thank U for giving me chance and beliving in me.
It is always nice to see U as a friend! That means the world to me!  
I hope that U R happy and that U had amazing Birthday.
:-)
It looks like I'm in NY 6-14th. I probably will work few days, but let me know if U R arround then.
Thank U so so much.

 
------Original Message------
From: Jeffrey Epstein
To: Petra Nemcova
Sent: 21 Jan 2008 09:12
Subject: 

Petra,  
         I would appreciate the opportunity to explain more fully ,when you and I are once again in the same city, For now, I will not need any help in prague.- thank you for your birthday wishes/


Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra
